hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -q 'src/main.*\.kt$' && echo '{"systemMessage": "Checklist for src/main .kt change:\n1. Tests - add or update unit/UI tests in src/test/ or src/androidTest/\n2. Docs - update docs/ if this affects game flow, data models, or screen behavior."}' || true

JAVA_HOME=/usr/local/android-studio/jbr ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest > /tmp/tc-test.txt 2>&1; CODE=$?; [ $CODE -ne 0 ] && tail -40 /tmp/tc-test.txt | jq -Rs '{"systemMessage":("Unit tests FAILED — fix before continuing:\n" + .)}' || true
